feed.title: SAP Community - Certification
feed.subtitle: Certification blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: Blog: Unlock New Opportunities – SAP's Industry Cloud Partner Certification
entry.content:
By Christian Hahn

In today's dynamic technology world, staying ahead of the curve is essential for businesses to thrive. SAP, a global leader in enterprise software solutions, is also a leader in enterprise innovation. With that in mind, we are introducing an exciting new offering for Industry Cloud partners to earn the designation “SAP-certified integration with GROW with SAP for their Industry Cloud applications built as SAP Business Technology Platform extensions.

This certification opens a world of possibilities for partners looking to demonstrate the technical integration and compatibility of their Industry Cloud applications with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 
 

Discover the Path to Certification.
 

This partner service offering is an optional, yet highly valuable program designed to ensure that Industry Cloud applications and solutions listed on the SAP Store are seamlessly integrated and fully compatible with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The certification process is rigorous and thorough, involving comprehensive testing and evaluation of the partner's solution to ensure it meets SAP's high standards of technical integration. You will be working with a dedicated SAP integration consultant throughout the process.  

Enjoy the benefits of providing a certified Industry Cloud partner solution, including:

  • Credibility and Trust: Achieving certification for your Industry Cloud solution is a powerful testament to a partner's commitment to quality and technical excellence. It instills trust in customers and prospects, assuring them that the certified solution is not only compatible but also optimized for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and following SAP best practices.
  • Market Visibility: SAP Store is a globally recognized marketplace for SAP solutions. With a certified solution, partners gain increased visibility, attracting potential customers looking for reliable and integrated Industry Cloud applications.
  • Competitive Advantage: Certification sets partners apart in a competitive market. It demonstrates a deep understanding of SAP technologies and a dedication to delivering exceptional solutions.
  • Access to SAP Ecosystem: Certified partners gain access to SAP's vast ecosystem of resources, support, and collaboration opportunities, opening doors to new growth avenues.
  • Customer Satisfaction: Certified solutions are more likely to meet customer expectations, leading to higher satisfaction rates, reduced support requests, and enhanced customer retention.
     

Sign up now.

Take advantage of this opportunity and sign up directly via the Partner Benefits Catalog, if your solution is an industry cloud extension built on SAP Business Technology Platform and integrated with SAP S/4HANA public edition.

You can also find additional information in our FAQ document and by visiting SAP's Integration and Certification Center. Please contact icc@sap.com with any questions you may have.

entry.title: Register now: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud – Partner Certification Academies
entry.content:
• In Jan 2024, SAP Learning has introduced new changes to SAP Learning Journeys, SAP Certification Exams and the Stay Current cycle.  To support our partner ecosystem, with these new changes for aspiring and existing consultants with Certifications, we have launched a new edition of SAP Partner Certification Academies for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.
  • The SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud – Partner Certification Academies is meant for aspiring LOB functional consultants and project managers, that are looking to get certified on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Role Based & LoB Certifications.
  • The academies provide expert guidance, allowing learners to build familiarity & understand certification guidance across various topics, covered in the SAP Learning Journeys, which reduces the time spent in the self-paced consumption of LJs.  The Academies provide learners, an overview of key concepts, tips & tricks to optimally consume the SAP Learning Journeys while preparing them for their SAP Certification exam.

Benefits of this Program:

  • Our offering improves your chances of passing the SAP Certification Exam.
  • Our offering enhances and accelerates your learning path in effectively progressing through an SAP Learning Journey to prepare for an SAP Certification Exam.
  • Key Points:
  • Participation in the Certification Academies are free of charge, as always. Certification hub subscriptions and LH subscriptions, however remain, the responsibility of the individual consultant/ partner.
  • The Academies are based on the new version of Learning Journeys and Certification Exams released as of Jan 24, 2024. This is every partner’s best opportunity, to not lose any time and get started on their Certification efforts.
  • The Academies run in both EMEA / APJ and NA/ EMEA time zones, therefore we should encourage all-round participation from our partners.  

Target: Audience

 

  • SAP S/4HANA - LoB Consultants looking to UPSKILL to (or) REFRESH their SAP S/4HANA Cloud LoB fundamentals.
  • SAP S/4HANA - LoB Consultants looking to get SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Cloud) Certified.

Fee
This is a free of charge offering. However, it is mandatory that the Partner has access to a full subscription of SAP Learning Hub, to access all the content of the SAP Learning Journeys for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Date of the Academies:

  • 11th March 2024 to 14th March 2024.

Registration Link: 

  • Link to Register  

Please reach out to sapna.subramaniam@sap.com in case of any questions on this offering!

I welcome your questions and looking forward to having you participate in our Academies.

entry.title: Inetum valora las certificaciones SAP para reforzar su compromiso con la excelencia y la innovación
entry.content:
SAP ha tenido la oportunidad de entrevistar a Ignacio Artiaga, director de Desarrollo de Negocio Estratégico SAP en Inetum. Inetum es una empresa europea líder en servicios y soluciones tecnológicas para impulsar la transformación digital. En la entrevista, Inetum esboza su camino hacia la adquisición de certificaciones SAP, discutiendo la importancia estratégica y los beneficios de las certificaciones. Inetum también describe cómo cubren todo el porfolio de soluciones SAP y tienen clientes en todos los segmentos de mercado.

Por favor comience describiendo su empresa y los servicios que ofrece.

INETUM es una empresa europea líder en servicios y soluciones tecnológicas, dedicada a impulsar la digitalización de empresas y organizaciones en los 27 países en los que opera. Con un enfoque centrado en el cliente, ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios que abarcan desde la consultoría y el desarrollo de software hasta servicios de infraestructura y gestión de datos.

En la actualidad, la compañía cuenta con más de 28.000 empleados, una facturación global de 2.400 millones de euros y 2.700 consultores SAP, lo que nos convierte en uno de los grandes players en esta tecnología.

En este ámbito en concreto, cubrimos todo el porfolio de soluciones SAP y contamos con clientes en prácticamente todos los sectores y segmentos de mercado, siendo nuestras principales fortalezas el foco en la calidad, nuestra amplia experiencia en soluciones cloud y nuestro conocimiento de ciertos sectores y áreas funcionales, como Retail&CPG, Sector Público o Recursos Humanos.

Ignacio Artiaga, director de Desarrollo de Negocio Estratégico SAP en Inetum

 

¿Por qué decidieron inicialmente (en 2008) obtener una certificación de la categoría de socio SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner?

En 2008, decidimos obtener la certificación de la categoría de socio SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner con el objetivo de fortalecer nuestra posición como proveedores de servicios SAP de confianza. Esta certificación, a la que más tarde se unieron otras en outsourcing, ha consolidado nuestro compromiso con la excelencia en la prestación de servicios.

Contamos con certificaciones especializadas en Cloud and Infrastructure Operations, Hosting Operations, SAP BTP Operations, Business Suite Solutions Operations, SAP HANA Operations, SAP S/4HANA Solutions Operations y SuccessFactors Solutions Operations.

Asimismo, hemos adquirido competencias avanzadas en diversos campos, como Human Capital Management, con especializaciones en Compensation and Commission, Core HR and Payroll, Learning, Talent Management, Analytics and Planning, Application Development and Integration, Database and Data Management.

También hemos obtenido certificaciones en SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) con especialización en Commerce, Customer Data Platform, Marketing, Sales, and Service, así como en Spend Management y Supply Chain Management.

Adicionalmente, nos enorgullece destacar que somos Partner Center of Expertise, lo que nos capacita para la venta de licencias SAP y su mantenimiento. Estas certificaciones y competencias adicionales refuerzan nuestra posición como líderes en el sector y demuestran nuestro compromiso continuo con la calidad y la innovación en la entrega de soluciones SAP.

Como hemos visto, desde la primera certificación han expandido el alcance de las certificaciones, es decir no solo han ido recertificando, sino que han añadido certificaciones adicionales. ¿Cuál ha sido la razón?

El objetivo de ampliar nuestras certificaciones SAP está enmarcado dentro de nuestra búsqueda constante de la excelencia y de la mejora continua. A medida que evolucionan el panorama tecnológico y las necesidades de nuestros clientes, hemos considerado esencial ampliar nuestras certificaciones para aportar un mayor valor a nuestros clientes.

La consecución de nuevas certificaciones no solo refleja nuestro compromiso con la actualización y la especialización en las últimas tecnologías y estándares SAP, sino que también nos permite acompañar a los clientes en una variedad más amplia de servicios y desafíos empresariales.

Al contar con un mayor abanico de certificaciones, estamos mejor preparados para ofrecer servicios más integrales y adaptados a las necesidades específicas de los diferentes sectores y líneas de negocio.

Recientemente han obtenido la certificación SAP BTP Operations. ¿Cuál fue el factor decisivo para optar a esta certificación? ¿Qué beneficios han obtenido con ello?

La decisión de obtener la certificación de SAP BTP Operations fue motivada por nuestro compromiso con la innovación en las tecnologías emergentes y nuestra aspiración de ofrecer servicios líderes en el sector. Un compromiso que viene desde 2017 con la creación del Centro de Excelencia Cloud, a través del cual, hemos centralizado actividades que incluyen análisis, prototipado, creación de soluciones personalizadas en SAP BTP y la implementación y soporte de proyectos en soluciones cloud, asegurando cobertura global y eficacia continua en este ámbito.

Por tanto, elegir esta certificación se fundamentó en el reconocimiento de que SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) representa un avance significativo en la manera en que las empresas manejan y aprovechan sus datos y procesos comerciales.

De modo que el factor decisivo para buscar esta certificación radica en nuestra determinación de ofrecer soluciones integrales que aprovechen al máximo las capacidades de esta plataforma. Con ella, estamos capacitados para proporcionar servicios especializados en operaciones dentro del entorno SAP BTP, lo que se traduce en una gestión más eficiente, mayor flexibilidad y un mejor aprovechamiento de las innovaciones tecnológicas para nuestros clientes.

Los beneficios asociados con esta certificación incluyen una mayor competencia para abordar proyectos complejos, acceso a recursos exclusivos e informaciones de primera mano, y la capacidad de proporcionar servicios más personalizados y adaptados a las necesidades específicas del mercado en el entorno SAP BTP.

¿En qué medida el mercado valora que cuentan con estas certificaciones?

El mercado valora positivamente que contemos con certificaciones en una amplia gama de áreas, desde operaciones de outsourcing hasta soluciones específicas como SAP BTP Operations. Estas certificaciones no solo respaldan nuestra capacidad para abordar proyectos complejos, sino que también indican nuestra disposición para adaptarnos a las últimas tendencias tecnológicas y responder a las necesidades cambiantes del mercado.

Por otro lado, las certificaciones SAP ofrecen beneficios integrales a nuestra empresa, fortaleciendo la credibilidad y confianza del cliente, resaltando nuestros puntos fuertes.

Además, ser un Partner Center of Expertise y contar con certificaciones en licenciamiento SAP refuerza nuestra posición como un proveedor confiable y autorizado. Esto no solo es crucial para la confianza de los clientes, sino que también puede influir en las decisiones de compra, ya que las organizaciones buscan socios que no solo ofrezcan soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas, sino que también estén respaldadas por las certificaciones y competencias necesarias.

¿Qué beneficios ven en las certificaciones de SAP?

Las certificaciones de SAP ofrecen una serie de beneficios significativos que impactan positivamente en diversas áreas de nuestras operaciones.

Por ejemplo, durante las auditorías, las certificaciones proporcionan una validación objetiva de nuestro cumplimiento con los estándares y prácticas recomendadas, asegurando la calidad y eficiencia de nuestros servicios. Las recomendaciones resultantes de estas auditorías nos brindan oportunidades para mejorar continuamente, afinar nuestras operaciones y mantenernos al día con las últimas mejores prácticas del sector.

Más allá de validar nuestro cumplimiento con estándares y prácticas recomendadas durante auditorías, estas certificaciones contribuyen al desarrollo y retención del talento, mejoran la eficiencia operativa y nos permiten alinearnos de manera más efectiva con las estrategias empresariales de nuestros clientes.

En última instancia, estas credenciales son un activo estratégico que respalda nuestro compromiso con la excelencia, la innovación y el éxito a largo plazo en un entorno digital dinámico.

entry.title: Beating the Odds: How SAP Skills Shaped Luca’s Career Despite a Struggling Economy
entry.content:
Luca loves a good challenge, whether it’s reaching the next level in his favourite video game, finishing a heavy book, or learning a new skill. “I try to challenge myself whenever possible, to try something new or do something in a different way,” the 30-year-old from Buenos Aires explains. “And sometimes I learn a little bit about myself. And that’s always a pleasure.” However, the circumstances in which he does this are not always the easiest: According to the national statistics authority, the inflation rate in Argentina rose to more than 200 percent last year. With gross domestic product fallen by 2.5 percent last year, and the peso fallen to a record low against the US dollar, the economic prospects in his home country of Argentina look bleak – once again in just a few years. 

Job market for SAP skills is growing 

Thankfully, Luca loves a good challenge. So, when he hit a roadblock with his first job in an office – he completed administrative tasks, “nothing a manager would do”, he says – he decided to do something about it. “There was not much space to grow, so I searched the internet for new job opportunities.” He wanted to combine both of his passions: Interacting with people and leveraging technology. And Human Resources could give him that.

Luca loves the interactive approach of SAP's learning journeys.“As I searched the web for new job opportunities, I found many positions required SAP skills. I did not know anything about SAP at that time, but realized the job market for SAP solutions is growing, so I searched the term online,” he explains. “I found a vast library of information, an online academy, fellow students asking questions, and teachers having fun teaching on many platforms. It was fascinating.” He wanted to become part of that world, part of that community. And he wanted to break into the world of SAP’s HXM. But how could he get started? 

SAP Certification as “a big plus” for his CV 

That’s when Luca came across the digital skills initiative, where SAP gives away 10,000 free certification vouchers and free online learning resources to help people upskill and pivot into tech jobs with an official and in-demand skill validation. He immediately got started. “The learning journeys on the SAP Learning site helped a great deal; their interactive approach is way more manageable and fun than just reading a document,” he says. He claimed his certification voucher shortly after, took the exam, and got his first SAP Certification as an SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HCM with ERP 6.0 EHP7. And that’s when his starting position suddenly improved. 

“Let me put it this way,” Luca explains, “from the moment I got my certification, I began to apply for relevant positions. I wanted to show that I had the skills they were looking for and if not, I had the capacity to learn them. Two months later I was hired for an entry-level position as a Trainee Functional Consultant.” Luca believes the certification was the most important factor and added a big plus to his CV. “SAP Certification makes a difference. Learning SAP skills and getting certified opens new doors for you.” And since he likes challenges, Luca has already identified his next goal, of course: Getting certified in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core and Payroll.   

Start your own success story     

Did you feel inspired by Luca’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!

entry.title: Celebrate Female Empowerment This International Women’s Day
entry.content:
This year, we are proud to invite you to join a very special International Women’s Day celebration on March 8 – a virtual live event in our beloved SAP Community! Get ready to learn about SAP and how to start a career in tech, and hear from familiar faces. Our SAP Learning Insights podcast host David Chaviano and his guests will help you understand SAP and its ecosystem, share inspiring career profiles and stories, and open up the stage for you to ask questions, get engaged, and network.

Join us on March 8 as we honor the remarkable achievements of SAP women worldwide, share empowering stories, and discuss meaningful initiatives that could push forward our collective journey towards equality. And to give you a sneak peek of our guest speakers, why don’t you head over to this blog post and learn more about Lin Fan, a young Chinese woman who faced sexism in her old job and turned her life around as an SAP Consultant with the help of SAP’s digital skills initiative? And if you’re interersted in ABAP development, check out Sandra’s inspiring story in the SAP ecosystem. We’re very much looking forward to have these amazing role models join our event as guest speakers!

And if all of this wasn’t enough positive excitement already, you will get the chance to ask questions, engage in discussions, and network with likeminded fellows. Plus, our speakers will also share valuable tips and tricks to boost your career, point you towards some great resources to get started, and help you understand SAP, its ecosystem, and key roles better.

Joining our event is easy! Simply let us know you’re coming by RSVPing to the event. On the event page, you will also find the link, meeting ID, and passcode to join the Zoom call.

Event at a glance:

International Women’s Day Intro to SAP and your Future Career

Mar 8, 2024 3:30 PM - 8 PM GMT

Event URL: https://sap-se.zoom.us/j/94016816749?pwd=ODNtMm9qa05jN21tZEh2WTVONGxQUT09
Meeting ID: 940 1681 6749 
Passcode: SAPcareer

Let’s bring International Women’s Day to life and benefit from an exciting, engaging, and inspiring way to learn more about SAP, it’s ecosystem and key roles. Your next career boost is just around the corner, so join the conversation and meet some new people along the way!

We are looking forward to seeing you!

entry.title: Unveiling the Future: The first role-based certification for SAP Analytics Cloud is live!
entry.content:
In the dynamic world of data and analytics, staying ahead of the curve is not just an advantage – it's a necessity. Enter the SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud, the first role-based certification in the analytics area that promises to set you up for career success. 

Embrace the Power of SAP Analytics Cloud 

Picture this – a comprehensive certification that covers the entire spectrum of a data analyst's role within SAP Analytics Cloud. From planning and modeling to story design, predictive analytics, and administration – this certification is designed to empower you with the skills needed to navigate the intricate landscape of SAP Analytics Cloud.  

What Sets This Certification Apart? 

This certification isn't just about passing an exam on a solution; it's about mastering a full spectrum of tools and techniques that make you a well-rounded SAP Analytics Cloud expert. The comprehensive curriculum ensures that you not only understand the theoretical aspects but also gain practical insights that can be applied in real-world scenarios. 

Your Journey Through SAP Analytics Cloud 

Dive deep into planning strategies, master the art of modeling, craft compelling data stories, explore the world of predictive analytics, and understand the administrative aspects – this certification leaves no stone unturned.  

Get started by learning the basics with these free Learning Journeys to prepare for the certification: 

Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud  

Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud 

Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning  

Stand out and Begin Your Analytics Journey! 

The future of data analytics is here, and it starts with you. Visit the certification page to explore resources, understand the exam structure, and embark on a journey toward becoming a certified SAP Analytics Cloud Data Analyst. Seize the opportunity, and let your analytics journey begin! 

Are you already certified in SAP Analytics Cloud and want to see what changes are coming for you? Just visit the certification transformation page.

Your future in analytics awaits – are you ready to embrace it?

entry.title: Empowering Dreams Through Digital Skills: A Glimpse Into Karla's Tech Journey with SAP
entry.content:
As a child, Karla would secretly venture into the computer room of her school to follow her curiosity. She simply wanted to explore the computer and learn how it works, the 34-year-old from Portugal explains. “I have always nurtured the dream of working in the field of computer science.” And when she finally saw an opportunity to do so, she couldn’t let it pass. And that opportunity was SAP’s digital skills initiative, where SAP sponsors 10,000 free vouchers to get certified in SAP solutions.  

“When we do what we love, it’s not work, it’s fun!” 

Of course, Karla still remembers the time she first encountered SAP. It was May 2022, and she was still finishing her postgrad studies in software development, when she joined an SAP ABAP Academy with her current employer Softinsa, a Lisbon-based company specialized in management services and application and development. “It was at that moment that I discovered exactly my professional passion.” Karla was hired as an SAP consultant for SAP Fiori and couldn’t be happier about it: “I don't call it work. When we do what we love, it's not work, it's fun!” And fun for her is working with people, serving people, she says. “Life is about how positively we impact wherever we go, how much we help others. That is what is important!” 

Never gave up on her dream: Karla Lima from Portugal.However, to reach her goals, Karla knew that she had to invest in her training. “I realized that investing in my career in this area was crucial. Even coming from a humble background, I never gave up on my dream.” Her wish to continuously evolve and develop, paired with her curiosity helped her a lot in advancing, Karla explains. And this was when she came across the opportunity she couldn’t let pass: SAP’s digital skills initiative. “I enrolled and started learning for free on the SAP Learning site and achieved the certification I aimed for.” In fact, Karla is the only digital skills candidate from Portugal who achieved a certification.  

Digital skills initiative helped her triumph 

But what sounds so simple doesn’t always of course have to be simple. “Learning something new is challenging, uncomfortable because we step out of our comfort zone,” Karla knows. “There are always difficulties, but after each step, seeing each application being built, step by step, it is extremely satisfying and pleasurable to see everything working, rewarding.” And when Karla means rewarding, she knows what she’s talking about.  

The change she saw in upskilling and getting certified via the digital skills initiative was significant, she says. “I could have given up in the face of all difficulties, but I chose to triumph. Overcoming obstacles, I achieved not only recognition in my work but also from clients. Today, I can serve them with excellence and total confidence. I believe all the efforts were worthwhile, and recognition is what makes us believe that. I love what I do!” 

Start your own success story or hire go-getters like Karla 

Did you feel inspired by Karla’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories! 

Are you looking to hire people like Karla? Reach out to the digital skills initiative for information on how to get in contact with her and other people like her who are entering the SAP ecosystem with a fresh cloud-first mindset. We are happy to connect any partner or customer with our candidates to provide a mutual growth opportunity for new talent and the organizations supporting our ecosystem.

entry.title: Recently SAP ICC certified? Learn how to leverage your certification benefits effectively:
entry.content:
In today's ever-evolving business landscape, to stand out from the crowd is essential. With competition intensifying and customer expectations soaring, businesses need more than just innovative solutions; they need credibility, visibility, and trust. With SAP Certification – a prestigious endorsement, will opens doors to a world of opportunities. Let's now explore how partners can harness the full potential of SAP Certification to propel their businesses to new heights. 

1. SAP Certificate and Test Report: 

Achieving SAP Certification isn't merely about crossing a milestone; it's about earning a badge of excellence. Upon successful completion of the certification process, partners will receive an official SAP Certificate and a comprehensive Test Report. These documents serve as tangible proof of compliance with SAP's rigorous standards and specifications. The SAP Certificate is a testament to a partner's commitment to quality and innovation, while the Test Report provides detailed insights into the solution's functionalities and technical performance. Partners are encouraged to leverage these assets to enhance credibility, instill confidence, and differentiate themselves in the market. 

2. SAP Certified Logo: 

The SAP Certified Logo is more than just a symbol; it's a beacon of trust and reliability. Endorsed by one of the world's leading software solution providers, this logo carries immense weight and prestige. Upon certification completion, partners are granted the privilege of displaying the SAP Certified Logo across various marketing materials and channels. Whether it's adorning the company website, featuring in promotional materials, or gracing social media profiles, the SAP Certified Logo serves as a powerful endorsement of the solution's quality and integrity. By prominently showcasing this logo, partners can reinforce their alignment with industry-leading standards and instill confidence in customers and prospects alike.

3. SAP Certified Solutions Directory and SAP Store: 

Visibility is crucial in today's crowded marketplace. Fortunately, SAP offers partners two invaluable platforms for increasing exposure and attracting potential customers: the SAP Certified Solutions Directory (CSD) and the SAP Store . By publishing their certified solutions in these platforms, partners gain access to a vast network of customers actively seeking innovative solutions to their business challenges. The CSD serves as a centralized hub for partners to showcase their certified solutions, personalize their entries, and provide links to official SAP resources, thereby reinforcing their credibility and authenticity. Similarly, the SAP Store acts as a virtual showroom where customers can browse, compare, and purchase certified solutions with confidence. With personalized listings and special subcategory placements, partners can significantly enhance their visibility and appeal to prospective customers. 

4. SAP ICC Partner Meetups: 

Connection and collaboration are at the heart of SAP's partner ecosystem. Through SAP ICC Partner Meetups and Partner Day Events, certified partners have the opportunity to connect, collaborate, and stay informed about the latest developments in SAP technology and solutions. These events provide a platform for partners to network with peers, share insights and best practices, and gain valuable insights into emerging trends and opportunities. As a certified partner, you enjoy priority access to relevant SAP products and technical updates, enabling them to stay ahead of the curve and drive innovation within their organizations. With events held in various regions and time zones – both in-person and virtually – participation is convenient and accessible for partners worldwide.

5. Success Stories and Press Release: 

Every success story deserves to be shared, celebrated, and amplified. Through SAP's press release and success story initiatives, partners have the opportunity to showcase their achievements, highlight their impact, and inspire others within the SAP ecosystem. Whether it's a groundbreaking implementation, a transformative solution, or a game-changing partnership, every milestone is worthy of recognition. SAP ICC provides partners with Press Release templates to ensure their certification success reach a wide audience across multiple channels. By sharing their success stories, partners not only enhance their visibility and reputation but also contribute to the collective success and growth of the entire SAP community. 

6. Enhancing your Marketing impact: 

In today's digital landscape, mastering key wording for SEO, leveraging video/written testimonials, and engaging with social media are crucial components of a successful marketing strategy, especially for SAP-certified partners. When optimizing content for search engines, it's essential to go beyond mere keyword stuffing and adopt a balanced approach that incorporates both exact-match keywords and Latent Semantic Indexing (LSI) keywords. By understanding the specific keywords their target audience is searching for, partners can enhance their content's visibility and attract potential customers actively seeking certified solutions. Additionally, showcasing real-life experiences and success stories through customer testimonials, whether in written or video form, helps build trust and credibility. Highlighting the benefits of SAP certification, such as shortened implementation times and cost savings, resonates with prospects and sets partners apart as trusted industry leaders. Furthermore, strategic social media engagement allows partners to amplify their marketing efforts, reach a wider audience, and drive traffic to their websites. Consistency, authenticity, and strategic planning are key to success on social media, as partners share newly created content, testimonials, blogs, and press releases across various channels. By updating social media bios, cover photos, and links to reflect their recent certification with SAP ICC, partners can enhance their credibility and visibility in the digital realm, ultimately maximizing the ROI of their SAP certification. 

For more information on SAP Certification and how it can benefit your business, reach out to: icc@sap.com 

© 2024 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company. All rights reserved. See Legal Notice on www.sap.com/legal-notice for use terms, disclaimers, disclosures, or restrictions related to SAP Materials for general audiences.

entry.title: Areeba's Journey to Learn SAP Skills: Shattering Glass Ceilings in Pakistan
entry.content:
Every single day is a fight for Areeba. As being the young, and a daughter on top, the 19-year-old faced many troubles due to her age from the beginning in her home country Pakistan. “There is a specific mindset in my hometown and the entire sub-continent when it comes to girls and women,” she explains. “I’m an introvert person, but I can share everything with my mother, because she’s the reason for my success today,” Areeba says. And a frequent topic they talk about is how hard it is for girls and women to work and grow professionally – even if they have perfect grades and a smart mind.  

“I wanted to become financially independent and strong” 

Of course, Areeba falls into this category. “I got 90% A+ Grade in my matriculation”, she says, “and at the age of 15, I was granted a scholarship in ACCA based on my result.” Areeba always considered herself a multitasking person and a quick learner, describing herself as someone who’s eager to learn new skills and successfully complete complex tasks. She’s not keen to waste time. “I wanted to become financially independent and strong,” Areeba explains. And after passing 11 exams of ACCA, she got her Higher School Equivalency (A-Levels Equivalent) and was being offered a Teaching Assistant position in my ACCA institute from where I studied.  

“I don’t want to waste my cloud skills,” Areeba explains why she is now looking for a new position outside of Pakistan.“I applied and got selected for a government initiative for digital skills training where I got to know about Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) and their applications. This is when she heard about ERP for the first time.  

At age 17, she started as a Trainee SAP Financial Accounting and SAP Controlling Consultant in one of the top Big4 Consulting. This is when a new phase of my life started. I had to deal with people older than my age and having more experience than me, I had to prove my skills every day. Gradually I developed my interpersonal and SAP skills more to answer all the biases. “Despite all the mocking and stereotyping based on my gender and age, I focused on my goals,” Areeba says. She got hands-on experience, led a team, worked with many local & global clients, and got certified in SAP Financial Accounting at the age of 18, became the youngest certified consultant. I was also involved in other ERP projects like Microsoft Dynamics etc. When she started exploring SAP Cloud solutions, she stumbled upon SAP’s digital skills initiative, where SAP sponsors 10,000 free certification exams for people who are considered underrepresented in tech. “I got certified in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Financial Accounting at the age of 19 and became Pakistan’s first SAP Certified Associate – Implementation Consultant in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting as I hold this title”, Areeba says with pride.

Looking for positions to use her in-demand cloud skills 

Since she applied for the initiative “I feel like being surrounded by people of similar interests and goals,” Areeba shares. “As I got to connect with many peers around the globe through SAP Community, we all help each other in understanding SAP better. There are numerous free of cost resources available to get you started like learning.sap.com.” 

When she got certified, Areeba was immediately recognized by employers, and was offered a position as a Trainer in an initiative of Ashreitech in collaboration with the National Aero Space Science and Technology Park, Pakistan Air Force, where I trained more than 30 students, end-users, and consultants in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in Finance. “I was selected as a trainer because I am the first certified SAP-certified Implementation Consultant in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Financial Accounting.” The training ended successfully with most students getting hired immediately. 

“I don’t want to waste my cloud skills,” Areeba explains why she is now looking for a new position outside of Pakistan, where she says there are only little opportunities for her. She’s hoping to find a job in Europe or the Middle East soon, leaving behind the invisible systemic barrier and glass ceiling that prevents her from rising to higher positions. She not only has the skills, but also the right experience and certification to demonstrate her expertise, don’t you think?

Start your own success story or hire go-getters like Areeba 

Did you feel inspired by Areeba’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more remarkable success stories! 

Are you looking to hire people like Areeba? Reach out to the digital skills initiative for information on how to contact her and other people like her who are entering the SAP ecosystem with a fresh cloud-first mindset. We are happy to connect any partner or customer with our candidates to provide a mutual growth opportunity for new talent and the organizations supporting our ecosystem.

entry.title: Certify your skills in SAP Customer Experience through SAP’s Role Based Certifications
entry.content:
SAP recently announced a transition towards role-based certifications and here in the SAP Customer Experience domain, we are thrilled to be a part of this journey. Transitioning to a role-based certification will help you to acquire skills and product knowledge to aid your career progression and ensure that you have exactly what you need to shine in your role.

Firstly, it is important to understand why SAP is making such a shift. One of the main reasons for the transition is to enable individuals to focus on acquiring skill sets and knowledge required to perform a job/role rather than just product functions. Some role based certifications have already been introduced such as the SAP Certified Professional - SAP Enterprise Architect and from 2nd April, we are proud to announce that the SAP Customer Experience Certifications will follow suit and be role based certifications.

As part of the SAP Customer Experience certification portfolio, we are pleased to release the following role-based certifications:

  • SAP Certified Associate - Solution Architect - SAP Customer Experience
  • SAP Certified Professional – Developer – SAP Commerce Cloud
  • SAP Certified Associate - Business User - SAP Commerce Cloud
  • SAP Certified Associate - Developer - SAP Customer Data Platform
  • SAP Certified Associate - Developer - SAP Customer Data Cloud
  • SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement
  • SAP Certified Associate – Implementation Consultant – SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
  • SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Service Cloud Version 2
  • SAP Certified Associate – Implementation Consultant – SAP Service Cloud
  • SAP Certified Associate – Implementation Consultant – SAP Sales Cloud
  • SAP Certified Associate - Developer - SAP Sales and Service Cloud
  • SAP Certified Associate - Integration Consultant - SAP Sales and Service Cloud

Which certification should I choose?

Based on the role that you are expected to perform on a project, you should correspondingly complete the relevant certification.

  • Identify the role that you expect to perform i.e. your consulting role that you want to perform as part of your career.
  • Learn the skills and knowledge required to excel in your role with tailored learning resources for SAP Customer Experience solutions on the SAP CX Learning Site.
  • Take the role-based certification exam corresponding to your chosen role.
  • Keep your certification and skills valid by completing yearly assessments to Stay Certified.

 

Role

Description

Architect

Business/technical owner of the entire solution that is being implemented by a customer.

Implementation Consultant

Implementation consultants use their combined product and domain knowledge to help customers implement SAP solutions.

Integration Consultant

Experts in understanding data sharing requirements along with necessary integration knowledge to connect to SAP and third-party solutions.

Developer

Experts in developing within the SAP ecosystem in line with clean-core approach.

System Administrator

Responsible for the daily operation of an SAP application.

Business User

Works on the SAP application as an end user.

 

How will the change affect me?

Learners can still prepare for certifications and get certified the same was as in the past. Learners can access all relevant learning resources on the SAP Learning Site to build the latest SAP Customer Experience solutions skills. With a subscription to SAP Learning Hub, learners get access to additional guided learning resources to prepare for certifications, access to four SAP Certification exam attemps and all the enablement materials and assessments to stay certified.

If you have any further questions, please also take a look at our certification requirements page here https://learning.sap.com/certification-retirements.

Stay tuned for further updates and please do not hesitate to share your feedback or questions that you may have.

entry.title: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
It’s no secret: Technology is changing faster than most businesses can manage. Well-trained talent is increasingly scarce, and digital skills gaps keep getting wider. To keep up with the ongoing changes in talent and technology, both learners and organizations need to be agile and adaptive to keep pace with the competition.   

At SAP, our mission is to create opportunity through learning and development for all. And with the need for fast and comprehensive upskilling, we are transforming our SAP Certification program, making continuous learning a priority. That way, you can always prove you’re up-to-date with the latest innovations. 

Here’s what this means for you: 

Get certified with trusted certifications, tailored to your role. 

Transforming our certification approach means making things easier for you. Demonstrate intermediate or advanced skills with out of over 80 globally recognized role- and product-based certifications across key SAP solution innovation areas. Focusing on the core skills and competencies, our role-based certifications, like this one for SAP S/4HANA Cloud implementation consultants, make your skillset more valuable as it gains sustainability and more relevance for longer periods of time.   
Good news: the enhanced SAP Learning Hub includes four certification exam attempts per subscriber per year and all learning resources to prepare for the certification exams. 
 

Stay certified and keep your skills up to date with the latest innovations. 

As a second step in our certification transformation, we are focusing on opportunities for you to keep your skills sharp. As of this April, certified learners need to continuously keep their skills up-to-date and certifications valid with evolving products by completing mandatory assessments before their certification expires. With an SAP Learning Hub subscription, you can prepare for and take the stay certified assessments at any time during the validity period of your certification. 

The standard validity of certifications is 12 months, with an initial validity end date of March 31, 2025. Every time you complete an assessment to stay certified, the validity period extends by 12 months. Easy enough, right? 

For sure! So, this is how you can keep your certifications valid: 

  1. Log into the ‘My Learning’ page with your SAP Universal ID (Note: your SAP Universal ID must be linked with a secondary email account from another email domain provider) 
  2. With a click on “Certifications” section you will find your passed certification(s) with the respective validity date.  
  3. Access the enablement materials that are linked to prepare for the stay certified assessment. You need an SAP Learning Hub subscription to access stay certified assessment. 
  4. Take the stay certified assessment linked to your certification. Once successfully passed, the new validity date of your certification will be updated. 

If you are already certified in an SAP solution, you will receive a personalized email informing you about the required next steps to ensure that you don’t miss your certification expiry date. So don’t worry, we’ve got you covered! 

We truly believe that the redesigned SAP Certification program will make it easier and faster for you to get and stay certified, to identify next career steps and goals, and ensure you have the latest skills and valid credentials on the newest SAP innovations tailored to your role and responsibility. With a subscription to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub, you can have access to all the learning resources you need to get and stay certified in one place. So why don’t you set yourself up for success? 

For more information, please visit the SAP Certification transformation page.  

Please share any feedback or questions you have! 

#SAP Certification #SAP Learning Hub

entry.title: Long Awaited Transformation for Your Credentials
entry.content:
Not a long time ago, somewhere in a not so remote area, there were two friends who used to be close, play together and share ideas. But one day, due to reasons unknown, a fight broke out between two and decided to go ahead on their separate paths. Before turning back on each other, they agreed on one thing, which is to meet someday to prove who has a better life. 

 

 

But that's not the reason stopping IC from being happy.  He started getting restless as the time was nearing to meet his friend who is doing way better than him. Eventually, he backpacks and went on to explore the solution for his misery and after traveling the length and breadth of Europe, he came across Baba Vanga’s predictions and accepted his fate with mixed emotions, counting the days for 2024. 

 

 

As IC is awaiting on prediction to be true with bated breath since the arrival of 2024, SAP has published its revamped certification program a few days ago. 

Though there is no change introduced with regards to certification hub as a part of transformation but considerable changes introduced for learning hub. 

As you know, we need certification hub access to give certification exams and learning hub access to clear delta exams to keep those certifications active. Until 2024, one of the major concerns for IC is the cost incurred to give the certification exams and keep them active as they are valid only for 90 days from the latest release. 


Learning hub cost before transformation:


Learning hub cost after transformation:

 


As you can see, there is more than 50% reduction in the procurement cost of LH subscription. Apart from this huge benefit, there are a couple of more benefits introduced as a part of the transformation program. 

  • You can now avail 4 certification exams with LH subscription 
  • The validity of certifications increased to one year from your assessment completion date. So the reference point has been changed, earlier validity used to be decided based on the release date but now it's based on your completion date. 

 

Though these changes are not specific to IC, it has created some level playing field which was lacking before. But still there is room for improvement if you compare with industry standards

  • AWS certifications valid for three years and 50% off on renewal 
  • Google cloud certifications valid for two years and 50% off on renewal 
  • Microsoft Azure certifications valid one year but free for renewal 

 

Certification hub seems to be redundant after these changes and can be availed by the consultants who want to complete more than 4 certifications in one go which is a rare use case. SAP may decide its fate based on its future usage. 

Let me know your thoughts until the IC friend comes back after meeting his PE friend to start his career with renewed energy!

See you soon! Venkatesh M

 

Disclaimer: The story is fictional but the pain point is real based on author's interaction with several consultants over the years

entry.title: Ashvini's Journey: Reimagining Success through SAP in a New Country
entry.content:
When Ashvini Kulkarni arrived in the US in December 2022, the skies over Boston were mostly grey. They might as well have been telling the story on the ground. The country was facing the widely expected recession following the pandemic. The news tickers on the airport TV were running headlines about tech layoffs, climbing mortgage rates and an uncharacteristically warm winter. “Quite a welcome!”, Ashvini thought.  

Feeling empowered to stand shoulder to shoulder with professionals who have years of industry experience: Ashvini.Hailing from the former princely city-state of Bhopal in India, it was not the first time Ashvini had flown far from her nest. Watching her father work on SAP kindled her interest in the Enterprise Ressource Planning (ERP) software. “My decision to pursue a career in SAP was heavily influenced by my father who happened to be an SAP user at one of the world-renowned multinational companies,” the 38-year-old explains. “His insights were invaluable, and they helped me realize the vast potential of SAP in the business world.” She soon found herself in Pune, working on SAP Business Planning and Consolidation (SAP BPC) for a Europe-based manufacturing client, was invited by her customers to go to Sweden, and later to Australia. Until things took a turn.  

Building a new professional identity from scratch

Ashvini got married and relocated to Boston in the United States, where her husband already lived. “In this new environment, I faced the challenge of building my professional identity from scratch,” she recalls. And despite her open work permit, the hiring freeze many companies put into place didn't help. With 12 years of experience in the field of SAP Business Planning and Consolidation consulting, Ashvini had a lot to show: a track record of various clients from diverse industries across the globe, many successfully completed implementation projects, numerous awards and appreciation from employers and clients, and a cosmopolitan mindset that only frequent travel could get you. But it wasn’t enough for Ashvini.  

To understand why, you need to know how Ashvini ticks. “I am deeply committed to continuous growth and self-improvement,” she says, “education and skill development remain a central focus, as I aspire to acquire advanced knowledge in my field and expand my skill set to excel professionally.” While traveling and exploration hold a special place in her heart, and immersing herself in new cultures, creating lasting memories, is important to her, personal growth and self-improvement are ongoing goals. “I aim to nurture my emotional intelligence, develop a deeper sense of empathy, and cultivate a growth mindset to enhance both my personal and professional life,” Ashvini summarizes.

SAP's digital skills initiative helped her get certified

And this is why she decided to SAP’s digital skills initiative. “Relocating to the U.S. prompted me to invest in continuous learning and skill development. Pursuing SAP software skills aligns with my goal of adapting to a new job market and building a strong professional identity in a new country.” So, she opted for a certification in SAP Analytics Cloud Planning – successfully passing the exam. 

Keen to try her hand at her newly acquired skill, the hunt for SAP Analytics Cloud roles and opportunities began. “A company named Forage was offering a simulation project with compelling exercises and technical challenges,” she says. Sensing an opportunity to keep her skills warm, Ashvini spent the next few weeks working in the simulation environment, exploring and testing SAP Analytics Cloud from every conceivable angle. 

Feeling empowered

Ashvini immediately sensed the extent of her decision to take the exam. “Obtaining the SAP Certification has been a remarkable milestone in my career. It has not only enhanced my technical knowledge but also boosted my self-confidence, particularly as I find myself navigating a new country and job market,” she says. “In a place where I'm starting fresh, this certification serves as a testament to my commitment to excel in the field of SAP.”  

Feeling empowered to stand shoulder to shoulder with professionals who have years of industry experience, she says she now feels confident to take on any challenge. “I am excited to explore new opportunities in the U.S. with this valuable SAP Analytics Cloud Planning certification as a key asset in my arsenal.” Knowing that employers value the verified skills she has, Ashvini is restarting her career. “Having an SAP Certification on my resume has made me a more attractive candidate to employers and increased my employability.” And it all started with her father laying the foundation for her success so many years ago.  

Start your own success story

Did you feel inspired by Ashvini’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more remarkable success stories! 

Are you looking to hire people like Ashvini? Reach out to the digital skills initiative for information on how to contact her and other people like her who are entering the SAP ecosystem with a fresh cloud-first mindset. We are happy to connect any partner or customer with our candidates to provide a mutual growth opportunity for new talent and the organizations supporting our ecosystem.

entry.title: SAP Zertifizierung - Updates 2024
entry.content:
Für SAP-Experten sind praktische Erfahrungen mit SAP-Software unerlässlich. Dennoch bietet die Erlangung einer SAP-Zertifizierung entscheidende Vorteile. Sie genießt im Markt Ansehen als valide, wertvolle Qualifikation und dient als verlässliches Gütesiegel. Einige Kunden fordern sogar explizit nach zertifizierten Beratern. Zertifizierte Experten profitieren nicht nur von einer Steigerung ihres eigenen Marktwerts, sondern erhalten auch wertvolles Feedback zu ihren Lernfortschritten. 

Im Januar hat SAP viele Neuerungen im SAP Learning Hub kommuniziert, nun wird das SAP-Zertifizierungsprogramm neu aus gerichtet.   

Das Ziel ist es, dass damit SAP Experten und Expertinnen einfacher auf dem neuesten Stand zu allen SAP-Innovationen sein können. 

Welche Neuerungen gibt es im Detail bei der SAP Zertifizierung?   

Rollenbasierte Zertifizierungen 

Zertifizierungen haben nun einen stärkeren Fokus auf die Rolle mit den jeweilis benötigten Skills und orientieren sich nicht mehr ausschließlich an Produkt-Features. 

Die rollenbasierten Zertifizierungen, wie z.B. für SAP S/4HANA Cloud Implementierungs Berater, konzentrieren sich nun stärker auf die Kernkompetenzen pro Rolle.   

Gute Nachricht: Der neue, erweiterte SAP Learning Hub beinhaltet nun im Abo vier Prüfungsversuche für Zertifizierungen und hat zudem alle Lernressourcen, um sich auf eine Zertifizierung vorzubereiten.  

Stay Certified: Fähigkeiten über die neuesten Innovationen auf dem Laufenden halten  

Die zweite Neuerung konzentriert sich darauf, dass Sie Ihre Fähigkeiten stets auf dem aktuellen Stand halten können. 

Um ihre Zertifizierung aufrecht zu erhalten, müssen ab April 2024 zertifizierte Lernende ihre Fähigkeiten kontinuierlich durch die „Stay Certified“ Prüfungen auf dem neuesten Stand halten.   

  • Die Standard-Gültigkeit einer Zertifizierung beträgt 12 Monate. 
  • Das heißt, dass Zertifizierte sich spätestens zum 31.3.2025 rezertifizieren müssen, um ihre Zertifizierung aufrecht zu erhalten. 
  • Jedes Mal, wenn Sie eine Stay-Certified-Prüfung abschließen, verlängert sich der Gültigkeitszeitraum um 12 Monate. 

Mit einem SAP Learning Hub Abo können Sie sich während des Gültigkeitszeitraums Ihrer Zertifizierung jederzeit auf die Assessments vorbereiten und diese ablegen. Dabei gibt es nicht nur Inhalte zum Selbststudium und Schulungssysteme zum Üben, sondern auch dedizierte Live-Sessions von SAP Experten mit der Möglichkeit Fragen zu stellen.  

Wie kann ich meine Zertifizierungen konkret gültig halten? 

  1. Melden Sie sich auf der Seite „My Learning“ mit Ihrer SAP Universal ID an (Doku: Verlinkung der Universal ID mit verschiedenen Zertifizierungs Accounts).  
  2. Mit einem Klick auf den Abschnitt „Certifications” finden Sie Ihre bestandene(n) Zertifizierung(en) mit dem jeweiligen Gültigkeitsdatum.   
  3. Greifen Sie auf die Lernmaterialien zu, die verknüpft sind, um sich auf das Stay Certified Assessment vorzubereiten. Sie benötigen ein SAP Learning Hub Abonnement, um auf das Stay Certified Assessment zugreifen zu können.  
  4. Führen Sie das Assessment durch. Das Assessment ist  ein online Test mit deutlich geringerem Umfang als einer initialen SAP Zertifizierung. Nach dem erfolgreichem Ablegen des Assessments wird das neue Gültigkeitsdatum Ihrer Zertifizierung aktualisiert.  

Wenn Sie bereits in einer SAP-Lösung zertifiziert sind, erhalten Sie eine personalisierte E-Mail, die Sie über die erforderlichen nächsten Schritte informiert. Das stellt sicher, dass Sie das Ablaufdatum Ihrer Zertifizierung nicht verpassen.  

Das überarbeitete SAP-Zertifizierungsprogramm sollte es erleichtern, sich zu zertifizieren und somit Ihr Wissen und Ihre Fähigkeiten stets auf dem neuesten Stand zu halten. Egal ob Sie Projekte angehen, sich auf neue Positionen bewerben oder Ihre Karriere als SAP-Experte vorantreiben möchten – kontinuierliches Lernen und Zertifizieren sind unerlässlich. 

Wie bereite ich mich auf eine SAP Zertifizierung vor?  

Neben SAP Learning Hub gibt es weitere Möglichkeiten von SAP, sich in SAP-Themen weiterzubilden und auf eine Zertifizierung vorzubereiten.  

  • SAP-Schulung (SAP Learning Class): Virtuell, oder in Präsenz in einer unserer Schulungszentren, geführt durch einen erfahrenen SAP-Experten.   
  • SAP Blended Learning Academy: Nehmen Sie an einem von SAP-Experten geführten, modularen Ausbildungsprogramm teil, das in einer SAP-Beraterzertifizierung mündet. SAP Blended Learning Academy beinhaltet sowohl Präsenzschulungen als auch Einheiten zum eigenständigen Lernen. 

Weitere Informationen zur SAP Zertifizierung

Webseite: SAP-Zertifizierungs – Transformation  

Blog: Fragen und Antworten zu Neuerungen im SAP Learning Hub  

SAP Community Group zum Stellen weiterer Fragen

entry.title: SAP Data Analyst Certification
entry.content:
Certificates won’t get you a job in data analytics.

But you know what might?

The real world skills you gain in the process of getting that certification.

I fell into the trap of certification collecting earlier on in my data career, thinking the more the merrier!

But when it came time for interviews, no one ever asked me about any specific certifications I had on my resume.

Instead, they asked about the tools I learned, projects I built, and how I tied my learnings to my everyday job.

One certification that teaches you data analyst skills in the context of real world tools and business use cases is SAP’s Data Analyst Certification.

Its courses teach you everything you need to work in SAP Analytics Cloud–one of the most popular platforms for analytics and planning.

The best part: if you’re a woman, veteran, career changer, or in a minority group, you’re eligible to take this cert completely free.

Start learning today at 👉 https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-data-analyst-sap-analytics-cloud?campaigncode=CRM-PM24-DAN-2677421&source=socialad-glo-linkedin-influencer-megan

entry.title: How can I prepare myself for the SAP Certified Associate - Enterprise Architecture Consultant?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Learning to Use the LeanIX Tool for Successful Enterprise Architecture learning journey

Overview
This Learning Journey is designed to help you prepare for the SAP Certified Associate - Enterprise Architecture Consultant – LeanIX Certificate. It provides LeanIX admins with a deep understanding of LeanIX features, its set up and introduces to two practical use cases.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to:

  • Get started with LeanIX, understand the general modeling guidelines of different fact sheet types, and import data into LeanIX,
  • Apply the Application Portfolio Assessment & the Application Rationalization use cases with LeanIX,
  • Configure the LeanIX meta model configuration, and define the adoption and advanced collaboration settings,
  • Understand and use the LeanIX diagrams,
  • Explain different LeanIX out-of-the-box integrations

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: The Future Has Been Written – the Rise of the Database Administrator
entry.content:
You might have received an email from SAP Learning informing you that your C_HANATEC_XX or C_HCADM_XX certification has been retired, or you found this retirement information on the SAP Certification Transformation | SAP Learning page.

Both channels provide the correct information. In this BLOG I will explain the why and the future for the SAP HANA certification.

 

Why the change?

There are two main reasons for the retirement of C_HANATEC and C_HCADM.

  • SAP has transformed itself into a cloud company in recent years. This cloud vision is not reflected in the C_HANATEC certification, because this certification is based on an on-premises product. The C_HCADM would fit perfectly into the cloud vision, however, the accompanying learning material is hands-on based and not well suited for a full certification.
  • SAP Learning's certification strategy has changed from product-based to role-based certifications. The C_HANATEC_XX and C_HCADM are product-based certification.

To meet the cloud and role-based strategy of SAP, I decided to break with the old, retiring C_HANATEC and C_HCADM, and move forward to something new. The new certification C_DBADM - SAP Certified Associate - Database Administrator - SAP HANA is role-based and reflects the SAP cloud strategy.

The C_DBADM merges the old C_HANATEC and C_HCADM certifications into one certification.

 

 

 
This merge isn’t a simple 1 to 1 copy of both certifications. I made sure that all pure on-premises topics from the courses HA201 - High Availability and Disaster Tolerance Administration, HA250 - Database Migration Using DMO, and HA215 - Using Monitoring and Performance Tools were removed. The new cloud topics from the SAP Learning Journeys HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud and HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud were added.

The Learning Journeys on learning.sap.com are available for free to everyone interested in the SAP HANA knowledge.

 

The C_DBADM Topics

When you start studying for the C_DBADM_2404 the following topic areas are important:

  • HA200 - Installing and Administering SAP HANA
  • HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud
  • HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud

Regardless of cloud or on-premises, an SAP HANA database administrator needs thorough knowledge of SAP HANA. This SAP HANA knowledge is conveyed in the theory chapters of the HA200 - Installing and Administering SAP HANA course. For this reason, the HA200 course remains part of the new C_DBADM certification.

In today's world, as an SAP HANA database administrator, you need to know your way around in cloud and on-premises. SAP HANA Cloud has many similarities to the SAP HANA platform, but there are differences. Hence, the HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud is also part of the new C_DBADM_2404 certification.

A new and important skill, for the coming years, is the knowledge how to migrate from an on-premises SAP HANA database to an SAP HANA Cloud database. To make sure you gain this knowledge I included the HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud learning journey into the C_DBADM certification.

Another change is version numbering. The certification C_DBADM now has the YYMM version numbering. The C_DBADM became available in April 2024, so the name of the current certification is thus C_DBADM_2404. Next April, the C_DBADM_2504 will be released.

 

Do I need to recertify myself?

Now I need to give you the classic SAP answer … it depends.

The holders of a C_HANATEC_15 to C_HANATEC_18 certification will be automatically migrated to the Stay Certified program and will automatically receive the new certification C_DBADM - SAP Certified Associate - Database Administrator - SAP HANA. No further action needed.

If you hold only a C_HCADM_XX certification, you must recertify yourself in the C_DBADM_2404 to join the Stay Certified program.

 

The Stay Certified program

On the 2nd of April 2024 SAP Learning launched the Stay Certified program. The new SAP Certification program makes it easier and faster for you to gain and maintain the latest skills and valid credentials on the key SAP technologies and solutions for your job.

In the Stay Certified program, you only need to pass the C_DBADM certification once to become a certified database administrator. After passing the exam, you can renew the certification every year by passing the Stay Certified Assessment questions. The assessment questions are based on the Stay Certified material made available each year.The Stay Certified program offers you the opportunity to keep your certification up to date by answering questions on new SAP HANA topics each year via the Stay Certified assessment.

The Stay Certified program is SAP Learning answer to the frequently expressed desire from the learners to offer delta courses and delta certifications.

 

Important links:

  • Homepage: SAP Learning
  • Learning Journey: HA200 - Installing and Administering SAP HANA
  • Learning Journey: HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud
  • Learning Journey: HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP Certification Transformation on SAP Learning
  • SAP Learning Hub

Hay Bouten
SAP Learning - SAP HANA Portfolio Manager

entry.title: Data Engineering is the Future - the Rise of the Data Engineer
entry.content:
You might have received an email from SAP Learning informing you that your C_HANAIMP_XX or C_HCMOD_XX certification has been retired, or you found this information on the SAP Certification Transformation | SAP Learning page.

Both channels provide the correct information. In this BLOG it will explain the why and the future for the SAP HANA certifications.

 

Why the change?

There are two main reasons for the retirement of C_HANAIMP and C_HCMOD.

  • SAP has transformed itself into a cloud company in recent years. This cloud vision is not reflected in the C_HANAIMP certification, because this certification is based on an on-premises product. The C_HCMOD would fit perfectly into the cloud vision, however, the accompanying learning material is only focusing on modelling, the data provisioning area isn’t touched.
  • SAP Learning's certification strategy has changed from product-based to role-based certifications. The C_HANAIMP_XX and C_HCMOD are product-based certification.

To meet the cloud and role-based strategy of SAP, I decided to break with the old, retiring C_HANAIMP and C_HCMOD, and move forward to something new. The new certification C_HAMOD - SAP Certified Associate - Data Engineer - SAP HANA is role-based and reflects the SAP cloud strategy. If you want to learn more about the role of a Data Engineer, have a look at the excellent blog Plumbing in the Data – the rise of the Data Engine... - SAP Community from my colleague Mark Green.

 

We made sure that all the shared modeling topics from the courses HA300 – SAP HANA Modeling, the SAP Learning Journey HC300 – SAP HANA Cloud Modeling were merged, and the new SAP Learning Journey HAHC55 – Provisioning Data to SAP HANA was added.

All the mentioned SAP Learning Journeys are available, for free, on learning.sap.com to everyone interested in the SAP HANA knowledge.

 

The C_HAMOD Topics

When you start studying for the C_HAMOD_2404 the following SAP Learning Journeys are important:

  • HC300 - Developing Data Models with SAP HANA Cloud
  • HAHC55 - Provisioning Data to SAP HANA

A Data Engineer - SAP HANA needs thorough knowledge of Modeling on SAP HANA. Data modeling in SAP HANA Cloud is very similar to data modeling on SAP HANA. This means that when you already have the HA300 knowledge, this would be sufficient and skimming through the HC300 would be a great refresher for the certification. If you have no prior data modeling knowledge in SAP HANA, you only need to study the learning journey HC300 - Developing Data Models with SAP HANA Cloud.

In today's world, as a Data Engineer, you also need to know how to provision data to SAP HANA. The knowledge on how to do this is available in the learning journey HAHC55 – Provisioning Data to SAP HANA.

Another change is version numbering. The certification C_HAMOD now has the YYMM version numbering. The C_HAMOD became available in April 2024, so the name of the current certification is thus C_HAMOD_2404. Next April, the C_HAMOD_2504 will be released.

 

Do I need to recertify myself?

The short answer: No

The long answer: The holders of a C_HANAIMP_15 to C_HANAIMP_18 certification will be automatically migrated to the Stay Certified program and will receive the new certification C_HAMOD - SAP Certified Associate - Database Administrator - SAP HANA. No further action needed.

The same is true for the holders of a C_HCMOD_XX certification, you will also receive the new certification C_HAMOD - SAP Certified Associate - Database Administrator - SAP HANA.

If you hold a C_HANAIMP_XX and a C_HCMOD_XX certification, then of course you only once get the C_HAMOD certification.

 

The Stay Certified program

On the 2nd of April 2024 SAP Learning launched the Stay Certified program. The new SAP Certification program makes it easier and faster for you to gain and maintain the latest skills and valid credentials on the key SAP technologies and solutions for your job.

In the Stay Certified program, you only need to pass the C_HAMOD certification once to become a certified database administrator. After passing the exam, you can renew the certification every year by passing the Stay Certified Assessment questions. The assessment questions are based on the Stay Certified material made available each year.

The Stay Certified program offers you the opportunity to keep your certification up to date by answering questions on new SAP HANA topics each year via the Stay Certified assessment.

The Stay Certified program is SAP Learning answer to the frequently expressed desire from the learners to offer delta courses and delta certifications.

Important links:

  • Homepage: SAP Learning
  • Learning Journey: HC300 - Developing Data Models with SAP HANA Cloud
  • Learning Journey: HAHC55 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud
  • Classroom training: HA300 - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07 Modeling
  • SAP Certification Transformation on SAP Learning
  • SAP Learning Hub

Hay Bouten
SAP Learning - SAP HANA Portfolio Manager

entry.title: Breaking Down Barriers: Hear from Chelcie Scott How She Broke into Tech with the Help of SAP
entry.content:
“Being a young parent is very hard”, Chelcie recounts. She was 20 when her daughter Eva was born, moving to Atlanta just one year later. Chelcie wanted to prioritize her little girl, but also needed to make a living as a single mother. She wanted her daughter to be proud of her. “I always wanted to be the example I wish I had”, she says. So, she moved to Atlanta, hoping for a better life.  

Starting to think bigger 

Chelcie soon started her own business as a performance coach. She still remembers the many highs and lows the challenge of being a single mother and entrepreneur all in one. “Having an income that’s not always reliable – it’s difficult. I’ve always enjoyed entrepreneurship, but it always comes with a certain cost of things.” She was in survival mode, as she says, and thinking bigger wasn’t in the cards for her as she tried to make ends meet. Until she was offered the chance to pivot into the tech industry.  

With the help from Rejoice Jones from Vower, an organisation which aims to connect communities with non-traditional employers, and SAP’s digital skills initiative, Chelcie joined an SAP S/4HANA bootcamp. “I want to change the trajectory for my family, to show my daughter that women, especially that black women have the capacity and skills to work in these spaces and sectors”, she says, aware of the unshakably low figures. After all, with only 27% of all computing-related jobs held by women, and the number for people from ethnic minorities dropping even lower, accessing digital skills and securing a fulfilling, well-paid job in the tech industry often seems out of reach for most of the world’s population.

Digital skills initiative provides free learning and certification 

“But Rejoice and SAP encouraged me to imagine and think bigger”, Chelcie explains. “I grew up in a low-income household. I was the first generation to go to college.” Knowing that you are just not exposed to what’s out there, you don’t always have the contacts and don’t always see people like you in those positions, she explains.

Designed to bridge the gap between providing easily accessible training and certifications for everyone considered underrepresented in the technology industry and supporting organizations with their workforce transformation and search for fresh talent, SAP’s digital skills initiative contributes to a more diverse and equitable job market, workforce, and society as a whole. “There are also so many barriers into these industries which is why the SAP free bootcamp and certification was so amazing for allowing me to take the next step”, Chelcie confirms.  

To learn more about Chelcie’s story, watch the video above – happy ending guaranteed!

Start your own success story today 

And if you want to follow in her footsteps, kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories! 

Are you looking to hire people like Chelcie? Reach out to the digital skills initiative for information on how to get in contact with her and other people like her who are entering the SAP ecosystem with a fresh cloud-first mindset. We are happy to connect any partner or customer with our candidates to provide a mutual growth opportunity for new talent and the organizations supporting our ecosystem.

entry.title: Singapore, Madrid & Phoenix: SAP ICC attended the 3 SAP Partner Summit for SME locations!
entry.content:
The biggest, the best and the most remarkable event is back! SAP Partner Summit for SME, SAP's premier event for SME segment, took place in 3 beautiful cities:

  • Singapore: March 12 - 13, 2024
  • Phoenix (AZ): April 10 - 12, 2024
  • Madrid: April 23 - 25, 2024

These events not only serve as a platform for our partners to directly hear from SAP experts but also serve as a great networking opportunity where SAP partners often connect among each other for business opportunities and collaborative ideas. In 2024 the tonic of the events was taking SAP Business One into a Cloud future and keep addressing the lower mid-market and small businesses with SAP Cloud offers around  #SAPBTP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition (GROW with SAP).

SAP Integration and Certification Center (SAP ICC) was present in the 3 events. In line with SAP's strategy it provides certifications for partner solutions which fit into the scenarios of GROW with SAP, SAP BTP and SAP Business One. As highlighted in an opening video recorded by Karl Fahrbach, SAP Chief Partner Officer, "when you build solutions with BTP, you can get them certified by SAP".
